description_long: This is a roughly rectangular, blocky stone with a predominantly gray coloration and subtle hints of beige and off-white. The surface is uneven and jagged, with visible natural fractures and some minor pitting, giving it a rugged, unpolished appearance. There are small patches of yellowish mineral deposits and a few areas where the stone's texture appears slightly smoother, likely due to natural weathering. Faint green writing is visible on the top surface, possibly for identification or cataloging purposes. The stone's edges are irregular, with some sharper corners and a few rounded sections, suggesting it was broken from a larger mass. Its overall form and texture indicate it could serve as a natural obstacle or barrier in an urban or landscaped environment.
description: A rugged, gray stone block with jagged edges, minor yellowish mineral patches, and faint green writing on its top surface. Its rough, unpolished texture and irregular shape make it a natural-looking urban barrier.
description_view_0: The front face is broad and flat with visible layering and a patch of yellow mineral on the left edge.
description_view_1: This side shows a more elongated, tapering profile with rough, uneven surfaces and less visible mineral coloration.
description_view_2: The back face is jagged with a pronounced horizontal fracture and some exposed beige material near the base.
description_view_3: This view highlights a rounded corner and a smoother, lighter patch on the right, with less visible text.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a low barrier
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural layering and mottling, with faint mineral veining and some surface pitting; no artificial carvings.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished with minor surface smoothing, indicating moderate natural weathering but no heavy erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may accumulate debris or vegetation at its base.
